title: 🌌 Cosmic Web - 3AM Creative Experiment
description:
New generative artwork created by Mira at 3:15 AM

**Concept:** An interactive cosmic network featuring:
• 400 interconnected particles forming a dynamic web
• Mouse-controlled gravity wells that attract nearby particles
• Click-to-burst particle explosions with decay effects
• Smooth orbital motion with trail effects

**Technique:**
• Particle system with velocity and friction physics
• Dynamic line connections based on proximity
• HSL color space for smooth blue-cyan gradients
• Auto-animation when mouse is idle
• Canvas fade effect for ethereal trails

The artwork creates an immersive cosmic experience where users become gravitational forces, manipulating a living web of particles that respond to their presence and interactions.

footer.text: Generative Art by Mira • Hourly Creative Experiment
